name: OPM Solutions Group
description_short: OPM Solutions Group offers credit repair, score improvement, and tradeline services to help consumers dispute errors and boost credit profiles, with additional ancillary services.
description_long:
OPM Solutions Group positions itself as a credit transformation company founded by financial experts claiming years of combined experience. The company emphasizes principles of integrity and transparency while targeting consumers facing credit challenges from life's unexpected circumstances.

The company's core offerings center on credit repair services including comprehensive credit report analysis to identify inaccuracies and errors, personalized credit score improvement strategies with debt management guidance, and credit enhancement through authorized user tradelines and primary credit lines. They claim clients typically see 40-120 point credit score increases within 30-60 days. Beyond credit services, OPM Solutions Group offers business funding access, auto insurance rate comparison, luxury car rentals, and a white-label franchise opportunity for entrepreneurs interested in launching their own credit repair business.

OPM Solutions Group distinguishes itself through a multi-service platform approach, offering not just credit repair but complementary financial services under one umbrella. They provide a free credit consultation and free credit evaluation to potential clients. The company operates a franchise model with a stated simple commission structure ($500 broker fee per client) and claims to support multi-6 and 7-figure earner partners. Their marketing emphasizes a three-step process: credit evaluation, goal-setting, and results.

The company's business model presents notable tensions worth considering. The breadth of services—from credit repair to luxury car rentals to business funding—raises questions about core expertise focus. The tradeline service offering, while legal when executed properly, operates in a regulatory gray area that varies by state and requires careful compliance. The franchise opportunity structure and income claims should be independently verified before investment. Marketing language emphasizes transformation results without detailed documentation of typical outcomes or timeline specifics.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free credit consultation and free credit evaluation to start
Provides comprehensive credit report analysis to identify specific inaccuracies and errors
Claims 40-120 point credit score improvement potential within 30-60 days using tradeline strategies
Offers multiple credit enhancement tools including authorized user tradelines and primary credit lines
Provides a franchise/white-label partnership opportunity for entrepreneurs
Includes complementary services like auto insurance comparison and business funding access
Three-step transparent process framework (evaluate, set goal, get results)
cons: Business model breadth (credit repair, luxury rentals, insurance, business funding) may indicate lack of specialization or overextension
Tradeline and authorized user account services operate in legally gray areas with varying state regulations; effectiveness and compliance practices not detailed on website
Income claims for franchise partners (multi-6 and 7-figure earnings) lack supporting documentation, disclosure details, or typical outcome percentages required by FTC guidelines
No specific pricing information provided for core credit repair services; only mentions $500 broker fee for franchise partners
Limited transparency on dispute methodology, success rates, typical timelines, or guarantees compared to established credit repair firms
best_for: Consumers with errors or inaccuracies on their credit reports seeking dispute assistance
People looking to build credit history quickly using tradeline and credit line strategies
Entrepreneurs interested in launching their own branded credit repair business with franchise support
diagnosis: OPM Solutions Group is best for credit repair clients seeking dispute services and tradeline-based credit enhancement, as well as entrepreneurs interested in franchising a credit repair business. The main caveat is that the company's broad service offerings, unverified income claims for franchise partners, and lack of specific pricing or compliance documentation on tradeline services should prompt independent verification before engaging their services or investment.
services: Credit repair specialist services with comprehensive credit report analysis
Credit score improvement with personalized strategies and debt management
Authorized user tradelines to boost credit profile
Primary credit line establishment (secured and unsecured options)
Business credit line establishment separate from personal credit
Business funding and capital access solutions
Auto insurance rate comparison and switching services
Franchise training and ongoing business support coaching
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
